distance_km.note: No web sources mention a 'Harbin Ice City Marathon' or any cross-country ski race with 50km distance; results discuss road Harbin Marathon (42.195km) and ice festivals only.

elevation_m.note: No information on any cross-country ski race 'Harbin Ice City Marathon' or its elevation gain found in sources.

country.note: Harbin is in China per sources, but no confirmation of the specific ski race existing.

region_state_province.note: Harbin is capital of Heilongjiang per sources, but no ski race match.

discipline.note: No sources describe a cross-country ski race with classic or skate disciplines named 'Harbin Ice City Marathon'.

field_size.note: Harbin road Marathon has 35,000+ participants, not 550; no ski race found.

founded.note: No founding year for this ski race; Harbin road Marathon founded 2016.

official_website.note: https://www.harbin.gov.cn is Harbin government site mentioning ice festivals, not a specific ski race site; official Harbin Marathon site is http://www.hrb-marathon.chinarun.com.

race_date_month.note: Ice festivals in January, road Marathon in late summer; no ski race date confirmed.
